text: The transition from the quiet, soft-lit open space to this vibrant and information-dense wall makes me feel a curious sense of alertness. The room before was sparse, inviting contemplation, while this place bursts with ideas and innovation. I feel energized, almost pulled between introspection and the urge to engage—to decode the meaning embedded in these colorful displays, and ponder the evolving relationship between humanity and technology. Presence here feels stimulating, as if standing on the threshold of discovery.
